findings.append_only: protocol mandates append-only JSONL; ledgers pre-touched in append mode; readers must tolerate absent files and malformed trailing lines (bin/stampede.sh:660-682).
findings.ledger_creation: Launcher creates .stampede/{run_id}/collab/{proposals,reviews,improvements,consensus,broadcasts}.jsonl via open(path,'a').close(); protocol.json written atomically; commander dirs + child-agents.jsonl seeded (bin/stampede.sh:591-700, 830-839).
findings.monitor_tolerance: Monitor uses wc -l; safe on missing/empty/malformed ledgers but undercounts trailing partial lines and never validates content. Synthesis/merge paths do not consume collab ledgers at all.
findings.final_bundle_source_refs: Required only as informal prose in stampede.sh:889; Bundle Shape in stampede-commander.agent.md:240-267 omits source_refs/adopted_consensus; no enforcement in merger or commander agents.

gaps: No schema_version, msg_id, from/to, kind, payload, parent_msg_id, signature, or seq fields in protocol; no per-event schema (proposal vs review share required_fields).
protocol.json is generated at runtime inside bin/stampede.sh; no docs/protocol.md or docs/collaboration-bus.md single source of truth.
stampede-commander.agent.md has zero mention of collaboration-bus, the 6 phases, or the ledger files; entire workflow conveyed via runtime prompt injection.
child-agents.jsonl is opened with mode 'w' during fleet seeding (bin/stampede.sh:830-839) — relaunch can truncate prior commander ledger.
No chmod/umask/flock for collab ledgers; concurrent commander appends rely on O_APPEND guidance only.
Monitor never JSON-parses ledger content; unknown kinds and out-of-order ts are ignored, not warned.
Bundle Shape lacks source_refs/adopted_consensus fields; no validator enforces presence; merger does not consume collab ledgers.
'adopt' phase has no dedicated ledger; adoption only described as a bundle prose requirement.
evidence: bin/stampede.sh:651-666 - collab_dir + open(path,'a').close() for 5 JSONL ledgers; protocol.version='1.0', profile='metaswarm'
bin/stampede.sh:830-839 - swarm-state.json + child-agents.jsonl seeded with open(...,'w')
bin/stampede.sh:889 - commander prompt: 'Follow workflow ... include adopted consensus item_ids and source_refs in bundle.json'
bin/stampede-monitor.sh:34-37,61 - wc -l-based ledger counting; no JSON parse
bin/stampede-merge.sh:88; skills/SKILL.md:583-584 - synthesis reads results/*.json, not collab ledgers
skills/SKILL.md:143-147 - SKILL.md only creates queue/claimed/results/logs/pids/scripts/commanders dirs (collab created by launcher only)
